name: empty_topics_fallback
description: Mix of repos with topics and repos with empty topics. Empty-topics repos must be skipped from clustering (plan §3 fallback) but the orchestrator still counts them in aggregate share — this fixture tests only the clustering side. Six total repos, four have alpha, two have empty topics: clustering returns one 4-repo cluster (below MinClusterSize, so emits zero clusters from the inverted-index step).
